# 8.3 Bill Prompt Assembler

## Classes

### `BillPromptAssembler[F[_]]` — Trait + Impl

```
trait BillPromptAssembler[F[_]] {
  def assembleForAnalysis(
    profileName: String,
    context: BillAnalysisContext,
    version: Option[String] = None
  ): F[String]

  def assembleForDecomposition(
    profileName: String,
    context: DecompositionContext,
    version: Option[String] = None
  ): F[String]
}
```

Flow: 1) resolve version, 2) load profile via `ProfileLoader.loadProfile(profileName, v)`, 3) collect block names from profile chain, 4) load blocks via `BlockLoader.loadBlocksByNames(names, v)`, 5) serialize context via `BillContextInjector`, 6) delegate to `ChainAssembler.assemble(profile, blocks, contextMap)`, 7) return assembled prompt string.

**`assembleForAnalysis`** primary method for Pass 1/2/3. Takes `BillAnalysisContext` with structured bill context; injects only values referenced by profile's context blocks.

**`assembleForDecomposition`** for decomposition step. Takes `DecompositionContext` (single concept group or section).

---

## Structured Context Types

### `BillAnalysisContext`

```
final case class BillAnalysisContext(
  billId: String,
  congress: Int,
  concepts: List[ConceptGroup],
  amendments: List[AmendmentSummary],
  relatedBills: List[RelatedBillSummary],
  pass1Results: Option[Pass1Output],
  pass2Results: Option[Pass2Output]
)
```

Multi-dimensional bill context: dozens of concept groups, amendments from different sponsors, related bills, prior pass results as structured outputs (not strings).

### `ConceptGroup`

```
final case class ConceptGroup(
  groupId: String,
  title: String,
  topics: List[String],
  sectionReferences: List[String],
  simplifiedText: String
)
```

Cluster of related bill sections simplified by decomposition step. Large bill: 10-30 groups; short bill: 1-3.

### `AmendmentSummary`

```
final case class AmendmentSummary(
  amendmentId: String,
  amendmentType: String,
  sponsorName: Option[String],
  sponsorBioguideId: Option[String],
  description: String,
  purpose: Option[String],
  latestActionText: Option[String],
  affectedConcepts: List[String]
)
```

`affectedConcepts` links amendments to concept groups they modify (best-effort mapping; Component 10 populates based on textual overlap or leaves empty).

### `RelatedBillSummary`

```
final case class RelatedBillSummary(
  billId: String,
  title: String,
  relationship: String,
  summary: Option[String],
  topics: List[String]
)
```

Related bill for Pass 3 cross-bill analysis or amendment cross-references.

### `Pass1Output`

```
final case class Pass1Output(
  conceptSummaries: List[ConceptSummaryResult],
  overallSummary: BillSummaryOutput,
  topics: TopicClassificationOutput
)

final case class ConceptSummaryResult(
  groupId: String,
  summary: BillSummaryOutput,
  topics: TopicClassificationOutput
)
```

Per-concept-group summaries + topic classifications. Large bills need per-concept pass; overall summary aggregates.

### `Pass2Output`

```
final case class Pass2Output(
  pork: PorkDetectionOutput,
  impacts: ImpactAnalysisOutput,
  stances: StanceClassificationOutput,
  fiscal: FiscalEstimateOutput,
  perConceptAnalysis: List[ConceptAnalysisResult]
)

final case class ConceptAnalysisResult(
  groupId: String,
  pork: PorkDetectionOutput,
  impacts: ImpactAnalysisOutput,
  stances: StanceClassificationOutput
)
```

Top-level fields: bill-wide aggregate outputs. `perConceptAnalysis`: per-concept breakdowns. Allows Pass 3 to reference specific concept-level findings.

### `DecompositionContext`

```
final case class DecompositionContext(
  billId: String,
  congress: Int,
  conceptGroupText: Option[String] = None,
  sectionText: Option[String] = None,
  sectionId: Option[String] = None
)
```

Single section/concept group at a time for decomposition prompts.

---

## Vectorization — Embedding Generation

Embedding generation is Component 10's responsibility post-analysis. These types identify embedding sources.

| Source Type | Text Field | Storage Table / Column | DO | Purpose |
|------------|-----------|----------------------|-----|---------|
| Section text | `BillTextSectionDO.content` | `bill_text_sections.embedding` | `BillTextSectionDO` | Per-section semantic search |
| `ConceptGroup` | `simplifiedText` | `bill_concept_groups.embedding` | `BillConceptGroupDO` | Concept semantic search |
| `BillSummaryOutput` (overall) | `summary` | `bill_analyses.embedding` | `BillAnalysisDO` | Bill-level similarity search |
| `BillSummaryOutput` (per-concept) | `summary` | `bill_concept_summaries.embedding` | `BillConceptSummaryDO` | Per-concept semantic search |
| `PorkFinding` | `description` | `bill_findings.embedding` | `BillFindingDO` | Pork pattern search |
| `ImpactItem` | `description` | `bill_findings.embedding` | `BillFindingDO` | Impact pattern search |
| `AmendmentSummary` | `description` | `amendment_findings.embedding` | `AmendmentFindingDO` | Amendment semantic search |
| `TopicClassificationOutput` | `topics[].topic` | `bill_subjects.embedding` | `BillSubjectDO` | Topic similarity |

**Rules**: Model determined by Component 10 config. Generated after each pass; stored in AlloyDB. HNSW indexes on all embedding columns. Component 8 does not generate embeddings.

---

## Context Serialization

### `BillContextInjector` — Object

```
object BillContextInjector {
  def serialize(context: BillAnalysisContext): Map[String, String]
  def serialize(context: DecompositionContext): Map[String, String]

  def inject(
    blocks: Map[String, InstructionBlock],
    contextMap: Map[String, String]
  ): Either[String, Map[String, InstructionBlock]]
}
```

**`serialize(BillAnalysisContext)`** placeholder → formatted text map:

| Placeholder | Serialization |
|-------------|--------------|
| `{{bill_concepts}}` | Each concept: title, topics, section refs, simplified text. Divider-separated. |
| `{{amendments}}` | Each amendment: ID, type, sponsor, description, purpose, status, affected concepts. Numbered list. |
| `{{related_bills}}` | Each bill: ID, title, relationship, summary, topic overlap. Numbered list. |
| `{{pass1_results}}` | Overall summary + per-concept summaries with topics (titled sections matching concept format). |
| `{{pass2_results}}` | Aggregate findings (pork, impacts, stances, fiscal) + per-concept breakdowns (numbered lists). |

Empty lists serialize to explicit "None" text (e.g., `"No amendments associated with this bill."`).

**`serialize(DecompositionContext)`** placeholders:

| Placeholder | Serialization |
|-------------|--------------|
| `{{concept_group_text}}` | Raw section text from `conceptGroupText` |
| `{{section_text}}` | Raw section text from `sectionText` |

**`inject`** behavior: 1) scan Context blocks for `{{placeholder}}` tokens, 2) replace with `contextMap` values, 3) pass non-Context blocks through unchanged, 4) return `Left` if placeholder unresolvable and block referenced by active profile.

### Serialization Format

Structured, readable text (not JSON). Example:

```
## Concept 1: Transportation Funding
Topics: infrastructure, federal-highways, public-transit
Sections: §101, §102, §105, §201
Summary: Authorizes $550 billion in new federal spending for highways,
bridges, and public transit systems over five years...

---

## Concept 2: Broadband Infrastructure
Topics: telecommunications, rural-access, digital-divide
Sections: §301, §302, §303
Summary: Allocates $65 billion to expand broadband internet access,
with priority for underserved rural and tribal communities...
```

Format determined by `ContextFormatter` strategy (swappable); default uses markdown-style. Pass result formatting: per-concept results as titled sections (matching concept format), aggregate results in separate "Overall" section.

### `ContextFormatter` — Trait

```
trait ContextFormatter {
  def formatConcepts(concepts: List[ConceptGroup]): String
  def formatAmendments(amendments: List[AmendmentSummary]): String
  def formatRelatedBills(bills: List[RelatedBillSummary]): String
  def formatPass1Results(results: Pass1Output): String
  def formatPass2Results(results: Pass2Output): String
}
```

Swappable; default markdown-style.

---

## Key Design Decisions

- **Structured context, not strings** — typed lists enable optimal formatting and independent serialization testing
- **`ContextFormatter` swappable** — different LLMs may prefer different formats
- **Empty lists produce explicit "None" text** — LLM distinguishes absence from data gap
- **Prior pass results structured** — per-concept breakdowns + aggregates serialized to readable text via formatter
- **Vectorization downstream** — Component 8 does not generate embeddings; Component 10 does post-analysis
- **`affectedConcepts` best-effort** — assembler includes when present, does not fail if absent
- **No LLM calls** — assembler produces string only
- **No bill data fetching** — receives pre-fetched context from Component 10
- **Version override per request** — test new prompt version for specific bill without changing default

## Error Types

```
final case class ContextInjectionFailed(
  profileName: String,
  missingPlaceholders: List[String]
) extends Exception(
  s"Context injection failed for profile '$profileName': missing values for placeholders: ${missingPlaceholders.mkString(", ")}"
)
```

## Acceptance Criteria

| Criterion | Test |
|-----------|------|
| `assembleForAnalysis` loads profile/blocks, injects context, returns assembled prompt | Mock loader + 3 concepts → verify all concept titles present |
| `assembleForAnalysis` uses config default version when `version = None` | No override → `ProfileLoader` called with `config.defaultVersion` |
| `assembleForAnalysis` uses override version when provided | `version = Some("2.0.0")` → `ProfileLoader` called with `"2.0.0"` |
| `assembleForDecomposition` works with `concept-simplification` profile | `DecompositionContext(conceptGroupText = Some(...))` → prompt contains concept text |
| `assembleForDecomposition` works with `section-classification` profile | `DecompositionContext(sectionText = Some(...))` → prompt contains section text |
| Concepts serialized with titles, topics, section refs, summaries | 3 concepts → 3 titled sections with dividers |
| Concept ordering preserved | [A, B, C] → appear in that order |
| Amendments serialized as numbered list with all fields | 5 amendments → 5 numbered entries with sponsor, description, purpose |
| Amendments with `affectedConcepts` include cross-references | Amendment with `affectedConcepts = ["transportation-funding"]` → text mentions concept |
| Amendments with empty `affectedConcepts` still serialized | No linkage → serialized without concept references |
| Related bills serialized with relationship type and topic overlap | 2 related bills → 2 entries with relationship and topics |
| Empty concept list produces meaningful "None" text | `concepts = List()` → "No concepts extracted" |
| Empty amendment list produces meaningful "None" text | `amendments = List()` → "No amendments associated with this bill." |
| Empty related bills list produces "None" text | `relatedBills = List()` → "No related bills identified." |
| Pass 1 results serialized with per-concept summaries and topics | `pass1Results = Some(...)` → each concept's summary and topics |
| Pass 1 results include overall summary distinct from per-concept | 3 concepts + overall → overall separate from per-concept sections |
| Pass 2 results serialized with aggregate + per-concept breakdowns | `pass2Results = Some(...)` → aggregate pork/impact/stance/fiscal + per-concept |
| Pass 2 per-concept findings reference concept groupIds | `ConceptAnalysisResult(groupId = "transportation")` → serialized with concept group label |
| Pass 1 prompt contains concepts/amendments but not pass results | `pass1-extraction` → no `{{pass1_results}}` in output |
| Pass 2 prompt contains concepts, amendments, AND Pass 1 results | `pass2-deep-analysis` → all three present |
| Pass 3 prompt contains all context incl. related bills and both priors | `pass3-ambiguity-resolution` → concepts, amendments, related bills, Pass 1 per-concept summaries, Pass 2 per-concept findings |
| Assembled prompt stages in correct order | Any profile → System → Persona → Lens → Context → Guardrails → Output |
| Weight translation applied to block content | `weight: 1.0` → wrapped with "You MUST" emphasis |
| Weight translation for low-weight blocks | `weight: 0.3` → framed as advisory |
| `ContextFormatter` swappable | Custom formatter → serialized output uses custom format |
| Profile load failure propagates | Loader throws → `ProfileLoadFailed` raised |
| Block load failure propagates | Loader throws → `BlockLoadFailed` raised |
| Context injection failure propagates | Unresolvable placeholder → `ContextInjectionFailed` with placeholder name |
| Short bill (single concept) works without decomposition | 1 concept → single section, no dividers |
| Large bill (20+ concepts) serializes all | 20 concepts → all 20 appear |
| Amendment with all Optional fields as None serializes gracefully | Missing sponsor/purpose → still serialized with available fields |
| Short bill Pass 1 (single concept) serializes cleanly | 1 `ConceptSummaryResult` → no confusion |
| Pass 2 with empty `perConceptAnalysis` still serializes aggregates | `perConceptAnalysis = List()` → aggregate fields present |
| `ConceptSummaryResult` groupIds match `ConceptGroup.groupId` | Consistency check across context |
| `ContextFormatter` handles `Pass1Output` serialization | Custom formatter → Pass 1 results use custom format |
| `ContextFormatter` handles `Pass2Output` serialization | Custom formatter → Pass 2 results use custom format |
